message:
The other day, my kids and I found ourselves with a rare moment of downtime. Instead of diving into screens, we decided to rummage through some old board games. It was such a joy rediscovering the simple fun of rolling dice and strategizing over snacks! 

While we were laughing and playing, I realized how important it is to have some low-tech fun tucked away in our preparedness plans. You never know when you might need a little distraction during a power outage or unexpected downtime. 

Plus, it’s a great way to bond and create memories! 

Have you rediscovered any old-school games or activities lately?
